source.specification: FIDO Client to Authenticator Protocol 2.1 Proposed Standard

transport_boundary.response_shape: exactly one status byte; only 0x00 is followed by canonical CBOR
transport_boundary.unavailability_source: only an out-of-band port availability or transport exception before a complete status byte is received

success.semantic_action: decode the one following exact canonical GetAssertion CBOR map

refusal_groups.next_action: correct the engine-built request or reject the incompatible authenticator response
retry the complete operation with a fresh observed head and fresh challenge
repeat only through a new explicit user-directed ceremony
free or replace authenticator capacity before retry
use an eligible authorized credential or change committed authority
unblock or replace the authenticator through its trusted operator flow
begin a new explicit user-directed ceremony if still desired
repeat with a fresh challenge and successful user verification
preserve the status as evidence and require operator diagnosis
